visual_description: A person wearing a blue jacket lies in deep snow near a frosted window, covering their face with one hand while reaching out with the other. The scene cuts to an indoor setting where a man with dark hair, wearing a maroon jacket over a plaid shirt, stands near a beige wall with a framed picture, turning his head and looking down. The man remains in view as he continues to look downward.
audio_description: The audio is not clearly audible.
